# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.x   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

EasyPharma is a health-critical platform. We take security seriously.

**Do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Please report any sensitive findings directly to the development team at:
`security@easypharma.local` (Replace with actual contact)

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a resolution.
